betting.blind_baseline: same side on every non-push quote in identical eligible universe

event_mapping: Eastern date plus unordered event teams; exactly one NHL game; retain source event id and game_id; fail closed on ambiguity.

one_touch_confirmation_guard.failure_policy: Any marker, even from a failed touch, consumes the one touch and requires a new preregistration; never delete or overwrite it.
pre_read_sequence: Verify DEVELOPMENT_FROZEN metadata, code SHA-256, frozen_recipe SHA-256, and all artifact hashes.
Require the deterministic confirmation authorization token from this freeze.
Search every Experiment 12 artifact directory for any prior confirmation_touch.json; refuse if any exists, including IN_PROGRESS or COMPLETED.
Atomically create confirmation_touch.json with status IN_PROGRESS before any predicate-level 2024-25 read.
Use only predicate-level 2024-25 scans and the frozen parameters; never refit or reselect.
Atomically finalize the marker as COMPLETED only after all confirmation artifacts and manifest hashes are durable.
one_touch_confirmation_guard.required_resume_action: User explicitly resumes Experiment 12 confirmation implementation/execution.

opponent_goals.home_win_probability: mean de-vigged home h2h probability across books
opponent_goals.snapshot: latest market requested_ts <= W1 SOG event anchor

pricing.market_gap: model conditional P(over) minus exact-pair de-vigged saves-market P(over)

residual_distribution.source: development-train starter actual saves minus fitted starter saves

sog_recipe.aggregation: sum player means event-team-book; cross-book median mean sum and median player count
sog_recipe.attribution: 2023-24 season-team PBP roster membership among event teams; actual-game presence is not a filter
sog_recipe.devig: normalize reciprocal decimal probabilities within exact O/U pair
sog_recipe.poisson_inversion: solve Poisson survival(floor(line), mean) == fair P(over)

threshold_selection.criterion: maximize goalie-night cluster bootstrap lower CI of model-minus-blind ROI delta per side

over.selection_reason: Maximum bootstrap lower CI; larger threshold breaks ties.

under.selection_reason: Maximum bootstrap lower CI; larger threshold breaks ties.
